author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends, and replacement tracking. Auto-discover devices, monitor battery health, track replacements, and receive daily reports.
notes: ⚠ Auto discovery only: select which battery devices to monitor.
Battery trends may be overestimated until the device reports at least 5 battery events.
Daily report sorts devices by Critical, Good, and Full categories.
Manual battery replacement is supported via Replacement page.
